item.title: I've Been A Cosmetic Dermatologist For 24+ Years: 3 Tips To Smooth Cellulite
item.description: You can have cellulite no matter what products you use on your skin, how old you are, or how much you weigh.

item.title: This Vitamin Majorly Reduces Dementia Risk (Per Research On 69,643 People)
item.description: Here are the easiest ways to ensure sufficient levels.

item.title: Women Who Struggle With This Are At An Increased Risk For High Blood Pressure
item.description: One more reason to catch those zzz's.

item.title: Anxious All the Time? Your Daily Drink Habit Deserves a Second Look
item.description: We had plenty of reasons to cut back on soda. Science just added one more.

item.title: This Supplement May Support Brain Activity In Those With Depression
item.description: As much progress as we've made talking about mental health, treatments can still be hit or miss.
